headline: Legal and compliance overview
subheadline: Use this page as the plain-language bridge between privacy, terms, payments, advertising readiness, and customer-facing operational expectations.

sections.title: Ad and content readiness
sections.description: The website is designed around original content, clear navigation, contact information, and legal disclosures so it can support advertising review and long-term search trust.

sections.title: Payments and disputes
sections.description: Transactions are handled through approved payment providers. Support questions, billing clarifications, and service scope issues should be raised through the contact channel before disputes escalate.

sections.title: Generated content
sections.description: AI-assisted outputs are reviewed as part of the publishing workflow. Draft content, media, and automation outputs may be revised, held, or rejected before publication.

cta.heading: Use privacy and terms for the detailed policy language.
cta.body: This overview page exists for clarity, while the policy pages carry the actionable legal language customers and reviewers need.
